name: data-redis
description: Provisions an optional Encore infra.config `redis` resource: a `redis` block in the generated apps/api/infra.config.json, reached over the fully typed REDIS_HOST / REDIS_USER / REDIS_PASSWORD connection (parallel to the Postgres SQL_* contract; no REDIS_URL). Redis is NOT a rate-limit backend (that is Postgres, INV-6) and NOT a session store (sessions are stateless JWT, INV-3/INV-7). The baseline lib/redis.ts client reads the triple; the first concrete consumer is the cron scheduler's large-scale distributed lock (cron optionally peers with this module).

REDIS_HOST.description: Redis host or host:port (default port 6379). Injected by the deploy substrate when the redis resource is provisioned (OAP dev via deployd previewRedis; staging/prod by the tenant).

REDIS_PASSWORD.description: Redis ACL password, declared in the composed infra.config redis block as { "$env": "REDIS_PASSWORD" }.
